text: بن أبي عمير عن عاصم بن سليمان ذكر في قول الله تبارك وتعالى (تسقى من عين آنية) قال: يسمع لها أنين من شدة حرها.

en.shaykh-tahir-ridha-jaffer: 16.Muḥammad ibn Abī ʿUmayr narrated from ʿĀṣim ibn Sulaymān, who mentioned the verse wherein Allah, the Blessed and Exalted, says: [They are] made to drink from a scalding spring (Q88:5). He (the Imam (a)) said, “A sound [like moaning] will be heard from it due to the intensity of its heat.”
